message:
feat(e2e): add Playwright logging harness for structured artifact capture

Create e2e-harness.ts with standardized observability for e2e tests:
- events.jsonl: timestamped events and step boundaries
- console-errors.json: console error entries
- page-errors.json: uncaught page errors
- network.json: filtered request/response data

Migrate all existing e2e suites to use the harness:
- repro.e2e.ts: mobile/desktop reproduction tests
- database.e2e.ts: database loading tests
- production-health.e2e.ts: production health checks
- mobile-ux-audit.e2e.ts: mobile UX audit tests

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
